# c43 pool/GMP leak-scan baseline
# Known findings on upstream master, generated by scripts/test/run-leakscan.sh.
# The gate (scripts/test/run-leakscan.sh) fails on any finding NOT listed here.
# Format: <mode> <kind> <identifier>
#
# Regenerated against upstream master a361b6797 (UPDATE_BASELINE=1). The crash/
# leak set is unchanged from the 9c9ac6549 baseline: the short-integer word-size,
# config and stats merges since then did not change it (the crashes remain
# headless out-of-context handler calls, not real leaks). LEAK item=1202/1203/1465/1889 and the
# integrate_pgm_x20 keyscan crash (findKey2ndParam OOB + unbounded integrator
# recursion, see __DEV/reports/REPORT-13-CI-LANES.md) are unchanged.
#
# Triage (see __DEV/reports/REPORT-4-BUGS.md):
# - leakscan LEAK item=1202/1203/1465/1889 - persistent state
#   (named vars / equations / refresh), not orphan leaks.
# - CRASH item=... - handlers called out of keyboard/menu context.
# - keyscan CRASH seq=integrate_pgm_x20 - REAL SIGSEGV, tracked pending a
#   c43 fix branch; not a scanner out-of-context artifact.
# Remove a line here only when the underlying finding is fixed upstream.

keyscan CRASH seq=integrate_pgm_x20
